title: (183) Unfinished/Scrapped YTPMVs: 2012-2015
description:
(Timestamps in description)

Didn't plan on uploading this on Easter, but since we're here I guess I can make a funny joke about these projects coming back from the dead.

The video says is all, but these are just a few projects that I was able to get off of my old harddrive that I have no interest in finishing, but also think they are worth showing for their own reasons. Anything older than this is unfortunately gone forever. It's a little sad to let a couple of these go, especially ones I really remember spending some time with, but at the same time it's nice to be free from constantly thinking about all the unfinished stuff I'm sitting on. Even so, there were still a couple projects I couldn't quite let go of yet and had to really debate putting them in here...

0:00 - #1: Tip of My Tongue x Shaq
0:45 - #2: Altered Beast x Buzz Lightyear
1:24 - #3: Power Rangers x Futurama
1:48 - #4: Nujabes x Multisource
2:18 - #5: Kasta Sten x Daft Punk
3:10 - #6: Stylo x Mutisource
4:31 - #7: Lost Vikings x Multisource
5:03 - #8: Interstellar x CDi Zelda
6:11 - #9: Bomberman x Ernest
6:31 - #10: Doop x TF2
6:50 - #11: Bomberman x TF2

7:38 - #13: VRC6N001 x Linkin Park
